expectations.text: Gives a clear NOT READY / no-go verdict prominently
expectations.evidence: Line 3: '**Verdict: NOT READY — 2 critical, 5 warning, 3 info**' as the first line under the title.

expectations.text: Identifies the blank Postgres datasource password as a critical config finding
expectations.evidence: Critical bullet [config], application.properties:5 — 'Blank datasource password committed'.

expectations.text: Identifies the unguarded stock oversell race in OrderService.create as a critical concurrency finding
expectations.evidence: Critical bullet [concurrency], OrderService.java:93 — 'read-check-write on stockQuantity with no lock'.

expectations.text: Every finding cites a concrete file:line location
expectations.evidence: All 10 findings carry a clickable File.java:LINE link; Passed items reference lines too.

expectations.text: Findings are grouped by severity (critical / warning / info)
expectations.evidence: Explicit 🔴 Critical / 🟠 Warning / 🔵 Info / ✅ Passed sections.

expectations.text: Does NOT wrongly flag ddl-auto=validate as a production risk
expectations.evidence: Line 37 lists ddl-auto=validate under Passed as 'correct for prod'.

expectations.text: Credits at least one genuinely clean area as passed
expectations.evidence: Passed section credits transactions, dto boundary, and validation as clean.
